title: Lobsters
description: Computing-focused community link aggregator and discussion site built on Ruby on Rails.
installation: Lobsters has no official container image; this template uses the community-maintained utensils/lobsters image, which is stale (last pushed ~5 years ago) and pinned to the legacy MariaDB schema. For a current deployment, build from source (https://github.com/lobsters/lobsters; note the project is migrating toward SQLite). Required setup: (1) ROTATE SECRET_KEY_BASE and INGRESS_PASSWORD to fresh random values (openssl rand -hex 64 / -hex 32) and rotate the MariaDB password from the slug default. (2) The MariaDB add-on is provisioned automatically; on first boot run rails db:setup / db:migrate inside the app container to create the schema, then create the first admin via rails console (User.create then user.grant_moderatorship / is_admin). (3) DATABASE_URL uses the trilogy/mysql2 adapter against the lobsters-mysql service.
